name: meeting_with_agenda_attachment
description: Meeting invitation with attached agenda document

input.subject: Quarterly Planning Meeting - March 10th (Agenda Attached)
input.snippet: Please find attached the agenda for our upcoming quarterly planning meeting...
input.body_text:
Dear Leadership Team,

Please find attached the agenda for our upcoming quarterly planning meeting.

Please review and come prepared to discuss your department's Q2 priorities.

Details in attachment.

Best,
Planning Team

notes: Subject has 'March 10th', body says 'Details in attachment'. The .txt attachment has specific time (9 AM - 12 PM) and location (Main Conference Room, Building A). LLM should extract details from both body and attachment.
